## Proposed Control

**Short, imperative description:**


**Category:** *(auth / input-validation / tool-exposure / api-session / monitoring / network / other)*


## Why It Matters

*One to two sentences explaining the risk this control mitigates.*


## Proposed Checklist Entry

```markdown
- [ ] **[Your control description here]**
  _Why it matters: [Risk explanation]_
```

## Machine-Readable Entry (optional)

If you'd like to propose the JSON/YAML entry directly:

```json
{
  "id": "category-NNN",
  "control": "...",
  "rationale": "...",
  "tags": ["tag1", "tag2"]
}
```

## References

*Links to CVEs, research papers, OWASP items, or standards (if applicable):*
